title: Morph
body:
Morph V2 – NeoForge 1.21.1 & 1.21.8 port of Morph by iChun

Morph allows you to take the shape and abilities of any mob you kill. This is a port of the original Morph mod to NeoForge, maintaining the classic feel

Key Features:
- Soul-stealing acquisition animation.
- Morph into any killed entity.
- Support for mob variants and NBT data (e.g., colored sheep, horse types).
- Configurable abilities and restrictions.

Gameplay:

- Kill a mob to acquire it as morph.
- Hit "[" or "]" (defaults) to open the Morph Selection GUI and scroll up and down.
- Hit "[" or "]" while holding SHIFT (defaults) to scroll left and right.
- Hit ENTER/RETURN/LEFT CLICK to select a Morph.
- Hit ESCAPE/RIGHT CLICK to close the GUI.
- Hit DELETE/BACKSPACE to delete a Morph.

Includes iChunUtil and Requires NeoForge 1.21.1 or 1.21.8.
